title: Intense Smoky Scottish Lamb Ploughmans
description: A briny, flaky, and smoky Scottish dish featuring lamb, sumac, and char-grill flavors, perfect for a date night, and Whole30-friendly. This ploughmans dish is a hearty and flavorful meal.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together sumac, sea salt, and black pepper.
Rub the sumac mixture all over the lamb shoulder.
Grill the lamb for 5 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Let the lamb rest for 10 minutes before slicing it thinly.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced red onion, dates, and apples.
Drizzle the olive oil over the top of the onion mixture and toss to combine.
To assemble the ploughmans, place a few slices of the grilled lamb on a plate, then top with the onion mixture.
